chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-1025 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on CMA No.3988/2024 3. For hearing of main case 05.03.2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahessar, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Saeed Ahmed, A.A.G along with DSP Muhammad Akram Rajput Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, A.A.G.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statement file on behalf of respondent No.03 is taken on record, according to which the FIRs have been challan, therefore, the petitioner is ordered to approach the trial court for redressal of his grievance. Under the circumstances, the instant petition is disposed of, in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
